3124020.name: Darby Is Here Forever
3124020.description:
Darby Is Here Forever is an adventurous and challenging platformer where you control a little vampire named Darby who has escaped from what was his home, and seeks to reclaim it from the claws of the Demon King, a selfish and greedy guy who has no problem about conquering, hunting or polluting to fill his pockets with gold.

Help Darby to overcome the dangers of his journey and reclaim his home!

  • Jump, die, repeat

Every death is a step towards perfection; learn from your environment, master Darby's skills and don't worry about the traps and enemies around you, you are immortal and there are plenty of coffins to respawn in.

  • The Blood Platform

Darby has a one-of-a-kind ability, he is able to create a platform made of blood while is in the air, this ability will be crucial not only for completing platforming challenges where there are empty gaps, but also to reach the farthest places or ease the experience when challenges turns impossible, there is more than one way to overcome challenges!

  • Nocturnal environments

Escaping from the castle is just the beginning, explore locations full of puzzles, enemies and platforms in more than 200 screens.

The retro visual style goes with every moment of this journey, all drawn with care, inspired by a mix of pixelated styles.

  • Other features

    • New Game + mode as a free update, a new game to unlock with options that allows you to customize the next game by preference, you choose how difficult the next experience will be.

    • Manage the blood you collect on your journey to unlock coffins and respawn near those areas that are so difficult to overcome.

    • Darby has learned to jump very high and glide, but beware, creating a platform of blood will leave him weak and unable to use any more abilities.

    • Epic encounters against Bosses will test you to the limit.

    • Retro music and sounds to match the adventure.

    • Darby's story will make you cry your eyes out.
3124020.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 巴斯克语
